chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3839 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 17403/2018 2. For hearing of main case 21.03.2025 Mr. Jawaid Farooqui, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel, show cause notice has been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. He seeks that the notice be adjudicated by the authority vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel further states that it may be just and proper for the respondents not to take any coercive action against the petitioner. Learned A.A.G. articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
